subsections.text: To be eligible for a certificate as a deputy branch pilot, a person must:
be at least 25 years of age;
hold a license under federal law to act as a pilot on vessels that navigate water on which the applicant will furnish pilot services;
be in good mental and physical health;
possess the requisite skill to perform competently and safely the duties of a deputy branch pilot.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
